title: YTP: Light Goes for the Lose
description:
[Epilepsy/Sound Warning - This video contains flashing lights and loud sounds that may not be suitable for some viewers].

This YTP is my contribution to A Friendly Game of Tennis, a co-op with Ultracslewisjr. To watch the full video, see https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GQ-lAW3EUZs. Some of the material in this YTP is not in the Collab.

Update: This summer, my greatest priority (other than study digital logic and improve my programming skills) will be to finish "It's Rip Snortin' Time! - 3", which is currently 2.5 minutes long. I will also finish responses to the Q&A from last summer. I am thinking of also beginning YTP's of Harry Potter and other sources.
